I wanted to go over a little bit kind of the psychological aspects of things, the buttons that people have. What are they looking for? Because this is where the benefits come from. We're talking about things like fear and greed, but there's a lot of other things. There's a lot of other desires, emotions that people have that can be appealed to that you can show how your product fulfills. I wanted to just kind of go through them with you if I can. The first one is fear. We talked a little bit yesterday that people act out of fear, I think, more than they act out of desire. The first thing that we all want is to be safe. The first thing we all want is to not die, to not be sick, to not have no money, which is kind of a fear, a form of dying. In any way that your product helps people not be afraid, if any way that your product makes people be safer, that's really the first thing. What the next very quickly is gain. What can they gain from your product? Of course, it's not just knowledge, it's not just better health, but it's not just money. If they get more money, what do they get from that? They get the trip to Disneyland with their grandkids. They get to buy a better house. If they get healthy, they get to go dancing again. They get to do things that they weren't able to do. They get to play with their grandkids. If they are better at their job, that's not the only thing that they gain from that. They may gain a promotion, so they gain more money. They may gain admiration. Think about all the things that your product enables people to gain and enables people to feel safe from. Those are really the two main ones. I think a lot of times we tend to rely on them. Here are the things you're going to get from the newsletter. Here are the ways that are going to make you feel safe. These bad things won't happen. Please buy our newsletter. There's a lot of other things as well. One of them, for instance, is ease. People don't want to do more than they have to. People are basically lazy. They don't want to do a lot of work that doesn't do anything for them. If you make their lives easier, that's very appealing. If you make their ability to invest easier, if you keep taking care of their health easier, and certainly if you make people's for business to business, if you make people's jobs easier, that's a tremendous benefit. Another thing people want and that you can talk to them about is how they'll get an edge, how they'll get an advantage. How they'll be able to do things other people don't do. Everybody wants that. Everybody wants that little secret that's going to give them the edge over other people. It's very important, I think, to a lot of people that they're getting something other people don't. I think we all want that. I want to get into the club that other people can get into. I want to get the deal that other people aren't able to get. I want to have that edge. How do you offer that to people? Sometimes that crosses over into what we've talked about here. That idea of what we call a touch of larceny, if it's almost illegal, like that, I don't know if it was in this group or not, I'm getting my groups mixed up now. Did we talk about that promotion? How to rob banks? There was a well-known promotion, how to rob banks. The idea was you're robbing the banks because they're not taking advantage of you anymore. They're not getting the outrageous fees. You're not investing through the banks. You're investing by yourself. In a way, it's robbing banks. That appeals to people because that's an edge that they're going to have. It appeals to people that it's almost a little bit illegal. It's almost a little bit unfair, but it's not. I get to do it. It's really very cool. Think about that. Give people an edge, and then another is absolution. I don't know if that translates very well in German, but it means like it's not your fault. It's okay. It's not your fault you don't have enough money. It's the fault of the government. It's the fault of getting bad investment advice. It's not your fault that you're sick. The drugs are making you sick. You haven't found out about these natural cures yet. It's not your fault that you're not doing your job as well as you could be because you simply don't have this wonderful loose leaf, this wonderful newsletter that can tell you all the secrets that you don't know. It's okay. To a lot of people, that's a very powerful thing because a lot of people go through life feeling things are their fault. If you could take that burden away from them, it's a very powerful thing. Being an insider, which relates to the edge thing. Having information other people don't, secrets, getting in places. If you can make your product, if you can make your newsletter be a place where it's a group of people that are together and they've banded together and they have this insider knowledge, we're investing in this way. We're doing it together. This is stuff other people don't know. Again, a very powerful thing to make people feel they're on the inside of something, getting secrets. Freedom, very important to people. Nobody wants to be a slave. Nobody wants to feel that they're controlled by other people, by institutions, by the government, by the medical establishment. To a large extent, we think people want money, so we tell them you can make all this money in the stock market. What they really want is the freedom that money brings them. It's important to remind them that when you make all this money with our product, you will be free to do as you like. You will have the freedom to travel the world, to quit your job, to do whatever it is. Same thing with health. It's one thing to not have arthritis, and that's very nice and you don't have pain, but it brings you the freedom to go play with your grandkids, go outside, dance, hike, all these things that you didn't have the freedom to do. That's a big thing. When people are sick, a lot of the suffering of being sick is that lack of freedom, that you have to be in bed, or you can't go out. You can't do things with other people that you want to do. If you talk to people in those terms, if you show them, hey, I understand that. I understand what it's like when you can't do these things. I want to help you get to where you can do these things. Very powerful. Same thing in all the business to business. The people that work in a job want to feel like they have more freedom, and that's what the knowledge that you give them does for them. Recognition. People want good things to happen to them. Sure, they want to make money, they want to be healthy, they want to do a better job, but they also want to be recognized for making more money, being more healthy, doing a better job. There's a couple of things. You can recognize them in your writing and say, hey, it's really great that you're reading this promotion. It shows that you're interested in doing a better job. That's one thing. You recognize them. The other thing is to show them how what you will do for them will bring them recognition. Being a better investor will bring you, your family, your neighbors will be in awe of what you've done. When you become better at being a human resource manager, being a purchasing manager, you'll get recognition at work. Of course, since you're in the newsletter business, the newsletter itself sometimes is a way to recognize people. I don't know if you ever do that with the business-to-business things, but to feature people who have done a good job, who have come up with innovations in the newspaper, who have come up with a newsletter, come up with a better way that they've come up with a better way of doing things, writing about them. They got a promotion, maybe. That can be very powerful. No one's going to cancel a newsletter that they've been mentioned in. Payback. You could also call that revenge. A lot of times people go through life and they feel like they've gotten a bad deal. A lot of times people go through life and people have told them that they're not going to be able to do things. Maybe it's their parents that said they'll never amount to anything. Maybe it was some teacher in the fifth grade that said, oh, you're so badly behaved, you're never going to succeed. Maybe it's people when they started their business or they went to work at their job, they said, oh, you probably won't do very good. It's very hard to do what you're trying to do. A big motivation for people sometimes is to prove those people wrong. Sometimes people still want to prove that fifth grade teacher that said they would never amount to anything as being wrong. A lot of times the motivation that people have is that little bit of revenge, that little bit of payback. It's like, I want to show them. That's why you see people when they go in business. They make more money they could ever spend in their lives, but they're still trying to show people that they can do it. They're still trying to prove the naysayers wrong. And the last thing that we can offer, and we've talked about this, is the importance of transformation, the importance of change, the importance of your life is never going to be the same. It's not just you're going to make money. It's not just you're going to be healthy. It's not just you're going to do a better job, but you're going to actually be a different person. There's going to be a transformation in your life when you start making the money you deserve, when you start getting the health you deserve, when you have the advice and information you deserve to be a better purchasing manager.
